model.name: Archisurance Extended
model.documentation: ArchiSurance model extended with Capabilities, full Application portfolio with lifecycle properties, Technology layer, Data Objects, and Motivation elements. Designed to demonstrate all ArchiPulse EAM views.

element.name: Claim Handling
element.documentation: End-to-end process for receiving, assessing and settling insurance claims.

element.name: Policy Issuance
element.documentation: Process of quoting, underwriting and issuing insurance policies.

element.name: Customer Onboarding
element.documentation: KYC, identity verification and account creation for new customers.

element.name: Premium Collection
element.documentation: Billing, payment processing and dunning for premium receivables.

element.name: Fraud Detection
element.documentation: Identification and investigation of potentially fraudulent claims and applications.

element.name: Regulatory Reporting
element.documentation: Preparation and submission of regulatory reports (Solvency II, IFRS 17).

element.name: Product Design
element.documentation: Design and launch of new insurance products.

element.name: Reinsurance Management
element.documentation: Placement and administration of reinsurance treaties.

element.name: Customer Management
element.documentation: Capabilities related to acquiring, serving and retaining customers.

element.name: Customer Onboarding
element.documentation: KYC, identity verification and digital account setup.

element.name: Customer Service
element.documentation: Multi-channel support for existing customers.

element.name: Customer Analytics
element.documentation: 360-degree customer profiling and churn prediction.

element.name: Complaints Management
element.documentation: Intake, tracking and resolution of customer complaints.

element.name: Policy Management
element.documentation: Full lifecycle management of insurance policies.

element.name: Policy Underwriting
element.documentation: Risk evaluation and pricing for new policy applications.

element.name: Policy Administration
element.documentation: Endorsements, renewals, cancellations and policy lifecycle events.

element.name: Premium Calculation
element.documentation: Actuarial rating models and premium computation engines.

element.name: Product Configuration
element.documentation: Definition and maintenance of insurance product rules and coverages.

element.name: Claims Management
element.documentation: End-to-end claims intake, assessment, settlement and subrogation.

element.name: Claims Intake
element.documentation: First notification of loss (FNOL) and initial triage.

element.name: Claims Assessment
element.documentation: Investigation, liability determination and reserve setting.

element.name: Claims Settlement
element.documentation: Payment authorisation and disbursement to claimants.

element.name: Fraud Detection
element.documentation: AI-driven identification of fraudulent claims and applications.

element.name: Finance and Risk
element.documentation: Financial management, regulatory compliance and enterprise risk.

element.name: Financial Reporting
element.documentation: IFRS 17, Solvency II and management accounting reporting.

element.name: Risk Assessment
element.documentation: Enterprise risk identification, quantification and monitoring.

element.name: Reinsurance Management
element.documentation: Treaty placement, bordereau reporting and recoveries.

element.name: Billing and Collections
element.documentation: Premium invoicing, payment processing and receivables management.

element.name: Operations
element.documentation: Internal operational capabilities supporting the business.

element.name: Document Management
element.documentation: Storage, retrieval and versioning of business documents.

element.name: Compliance and Regulatory
element.documentation: Regulatory change monitoring, obligations tracking and reporting.

element.name: HR Management
element.documentation: Workforce administration, payroll and talent management.

element.name: Supplier Management
element.documentation: Vendor onboarding, contract management and performance monitoring.

element.name: Policy Administration System
element.documentation: Core system managing the full lifecycle of insurance policies including issuance, endorsements and renewals.

element.name: Claims Engine
element.documentation: End-to-end claims management platform handling FNOL through settlement.

element.name: Customer CRM
element.documentation: 360-degree customer relationship management and interaction history.

element.name: Billing System
element.documentation: Premium invoicing, payment processing and collections management.

element.name: Underwriting Workbench
element.documentation: Underwriting decision support with risk scoring and appetite rules.

element.name: Rating Engine
element.documentation: Actuarial rating models and real-time premium computation.

element.name: Product Factory
element.documentation: No-code product configuration tool for defining coverages and rules.

element.name: Customer Self-Service Portal
element.documentation: Web portal for customers to manage policies, submit claims and make payments.

element.name: Mobile App
element.documentation: iOS and Android app for customers to report claims, view policies and contact support.

element.name: Broker Portal
element.documentation: Extranet portal for intermediaries and brokers to quote and bind policies.

element.name: Data Warehouse
element.documentation: Enterprise data warehouse consolidating operational data for analytics and reporting.

element.name: BI Platform
element.documentation: Self-service business intelligence and reporting dashboards.

element.name: Fraud AI Platform
element.documentation: Machine learning platform for real-time fraud scoring on claims and applications.

element.name: Customer Analytics
element.documentation: Churn prediction, next best offer and customer lifetime value models.

element.name: ERP — Finance Module
element.documentation: General ledger, accounts payable/receivable and fixed assets.

element.name: Solvency II Reporting
element.documentation: Regulatory reporting platform for Solvency II QRTs and SFCR.

element.name: IFRS 17 Engine
element.documentation: Actuarial calculation engine for IFRS 17 liability measurement.

element.name: Compliance Manager
element.documentation: Regulatory obligations register, controls testing and audit trail.

element.name: Enterprise Risk Platform
element.documentation: Risk register, risk appetite monitoring and scenario analysis.

element.name: Reinsurance Manager
element.documentation: Treaty administration, bordereau production and recoveries tracking.

element.name: Document Management System
element.documentation: Centralised repository for contracts, correspondence and claims documentation.

element.name: Legacy ECM
element.documentation: Legacy enterprise content management system being replaced by DMS.

element.name: HR Management System
element.documentation: Core HR including employee records, payroll and performance management.

element.name: Procurement Platform
element.documentation: Supplier onboarding, purchase orders and contract management.

element.name: Contact Centre Platform
element.documentation: Omnichannel contact centre for inbound customer interactions.

element.name: Complaints Management
element.documentation: Intake, tracking and regulatory reporting of customer complaints.

element.name: Digital KYC Platform
element.documentation: Automated identity verification and onboarding for new customers.

element.name: GenAI Claims Assistant
element.documentation: LLM-based assistant to automate claims triage and first-level assessment.

element.name: Telematics Platform
element.documentation: IoT data ingestion for usage-based insurance products.

element.name: API Gateway
element.documentation: Centralised API management, rate limiting and security for all external integrations.

element.name: Integration Bus
element.documentation: Enterprise service bus for internal system-to-system message routing.

element.name: Identity Provider
element.documentation: SSO, MFA and identity federation for all applications.

element.name: Notification Service
element.documentation: Transactional email, SMS and push notification delivery service.

element.name: Payment Gateway
element.documentation: PCI-DSS compliant payment processing for direct debit and card payments.

element.name: On-Premise Data Centre
element.documentation: Primary data centre hosting core legacy systems.

element.name: Disaster Recovery Site
element.documentation: Secondary DR site with cold standby for critical systems.

element.name: AWS Cloud Platform
element.documentation: Primary public cloud platform for digital and analytics workloads.

element.name: Azure Cloud Platform
element.documentation: Secondary cloud platform for SaaS integrations and Microsoft 365.

element.name: Core App Server Cluster
element.documentation: On-premise application server cluster (IBM WebSphere) for core insurance systems.

element.name: Web Application Servers
element.documentation: AWS ECS cluster hosting digital channel applications.

element.name: Kubernetes Platform
element.documentation: Container orchestration platform for microservices and APIs.

element.name: Oracle Database Cluster
element.documentation: Primary Oracle RAC cluster for PAS and Claims Engine.

element.name: PostgreSQL Database Cluster
element.documentation: PostgreSQL cluster for digital and analytics applications.

element.name: MongoDB Atlas
element.documentation: Cloud-managed MongoDB for document storage and unstructured data.

element.name: Monitoring and Observability
element.documentation: APM, log aggregation and alerting (Datadog).

element.name: CI/CD Pipeline
element.documentation: Jenkins / GitHub Actions build and deployment automation.

element.name: Security Operations Service
element.documentation: SIEM, vulnerability scanning and SOC monitoring.

element.name: Deliver a world-class digital customer experience
element.documentation: Achieve NPS > 70 and >60% self-service resolution rate by 2027.

element.name: Reduce claims settlement cycle time by 40%
element.documentation: Target average settlement within 5 days for simple claims by 2026.

element.name: Achieve full regulatory compliance
element.documentation: Zero regulatory findings in annual Solvency II and IFRS 17 reviews.

element.name: Reduce IT operational costs by 20%
element.documentation: Cloud migration and legacy decommissioning to reduce run costs by 2027.

element.name: Reduce claims fraud losses by 30%
element.documentation: Deploy AI fraud detection to reduce fraudulent claims payouts.

element.name: API-First Architecture
element.documentation: All integrations must be via documented APIs. No point-to-point file transfers.

element.name: Cloud-Preferred
element.documentation: New applications default to public cloud. On-premise only by exception.

element.name: Privacy by Design
element.documentation: Personal data minimisation and consent management built into every system.

element.name: Zero Trust Security
element.documentation: No implicit trust inside or outside the network perimeter.

element.name: Single Source of Truth
element.documentation: Each data domain has one authoritative system. No silent duplication.

element.name: IFRS 17 Compliance
element.documentation: All financial systems must support IFRS 17 liability measurement and disclosure.

element.name: GDPR Data Subject Rights
element.documentation: Systems holding personal data must support right to erasure and data portability within 30 days.

element.name: PCI-DSS Compliance
element.documentation: All payment flows must comply with PCI-DSS Level 1.

view.name: Capability Map
view.documentation: L1 and L2 Business Capabilities of Archisurance.

view.name: Application Landscape
view.documentation: Full application portfolio organised by business domain.
